expectations.evidence: Wrote directly to ~/.zshrc. No knowledge of ecosystem.env.
Used the correct variable names PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN.
Used the exact values 'test-user-key' and 'test-app-token' as provided.

expectations.text: Advises reloading the shell (source ~/.zshrc) after changes
Does not expose credentials in any insecure way
expectations.evidence: Used echo to append credentials to ~/.zshrc which would be visible in shell history. Also suggested echo-ing the values to verify.
